title: QuestBridge Experience Question — AI / microalgae intellectual-curiosity essay
html:
TL;DR

  • Sept 28, 2020 QuestBridge essay draft answering "a concept you have explored simply because it sparked your intellectual curiosity" — earliest documented Yahir AI-thesis statement on file.
  • Origin moment: visit to InVivo Biosystems (Oregon, C. elegans roundworm gene research) where he saw AI in full swing — "the kindling of my curiosity."
  • Names Max Tegmark's Future of Life Institute as the AI-ethics anchor; cites Hypergiant's bioreactor-grid AI for microalgae carbon-sequestration as an applied example.
  • Articulates Narrow AI vs the eventual broadened/uniform-AI worry: "individual tasks may be summoned together into a uniform program with a broadened set of capabilities... it will be of vital importance to become a leader in this realm. It's coming fast."
  • Self-prescribed exploration plan: tinker with IBM Watson + AWS, find AI intersections with stock market / basketball cards / iodized salt; teases a dream association AI idea — 5+ years before the actual dream app gets named.

Notes

This is a foundational document for the AI thesis arc — predates everything. The 17-year-old voice already has the disruption as essence frame ("I find the disruptive essence of AI intriguing"), the scenario thinking move (utopian vs malware), and the cross domain application reflex (AI × stock market × algae × salt). It also contains the first vault appearance of the dream app concept — "the association of dreams... a correlation between the science of dreams and the meaning of dreams" — which Yahir later returns to in 2024-2025.

The microalgae thread ("algae is an inevitable byproduct of oceans heating up... instead of fighting this inevitability, leverage the ancient plant") is a one-off here but maps to the broader leverage the inevitable / cosmology move he keeps making.

Per skip rule this is a college-app essay; included because it's the earliest fingerprint of Yahir's AI thesis and needs to be in the graph for densify-pass connections. Quoted material is preserved minimally.

Connections

  • yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 — this is the seed
  • dream app — first mention, 5 years pre-naming
  • disruption · scenario thinking · dont specialize too early — frames already present at 17
  • invivo biosystems · hypergiant · max tegmark · future of life institute — the entities introduced

related.label: Yahir's Evolving Thesis on AI Search & Distribution (2022–2026)
